XONLINE_TEAM

Contains information about a team.

typedef struct _XONLINE_TEAM{
    XUID xuidTeam;
    XONLINE_TEAM_PROPERTIES TeamProperties;
    DWORD dwFlags;
    FILETIME CreationTime;
    DWORD dwMemberCount;
} XONLINE_TEAM, *PXONLINE_TEAM;

Members

xuidTeam
XUID that identifies the team.
TeamProperties
XONLINE_TEAM_PROPERTIES structure that contains additional information about the team.
dwFlags
Flag values that can be the following:
Value Description
XONLINE_TEAM_MSG_RECRUIT Indicates the player who retrieved the team details has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_TEAM_RECRUIT message with this team as the sender context.
XONLINE_TEAM_MSG_GAME_INVITE Indicates the player who retrieved the team details has received an XONLINE_MSG_TYPE_GAME_INVITE message with this team ID as the sender context.
CreationTime
FILETIME structure that indicates when the file was created. This time value is reported using the current settings for the time zone and daylight saving time. It is not reported in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC).
dwMemberCount
Number of members on the team.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

See Also

Xbox Live Structures | XOnlineTeamCreateGetResults, XOnlineTeamGetDetails, XOnlineTeamEnumerateGetResults
